Based on the analysis, here's the deployment status:

**Phase 3: Output Result**

The PR for GW-4860 was merged on April 8, 2026 (commit f817101), and the CI build-and-test job (#77) ran immediately after. However, **the build failed**, which prevented the deploy-dev job from triggering.

The most recent successful deployment to dev was build #40 on March 15, 2026 - **before the PR was merged**. This means the fix is not yet deployed.

```
DEPLOY_STATUS: FAILED
REPO: gw-jwt-demo
PIPELINE: gw-jwt-demo
BUILD_ID: 4605766
BUILD_STATUS: failed
ENV_URL: https://demo.dev.generalwisdom.com
DEPLOY_GAP_REASON: build-and-test job #77 failed after PR merge, preventing deploy-dev from triggering. Last successful deployment (build #40) was on March 15, before the April 8 PR merge.
```

**Build Timeline:**
- **March 15, 2026**: Last successful deploy-dev (build #40) ✅
- **April 8, 2026**: PR #23 merged (commit f817101) to fix CI
- **April 8, 2026**: build-and-test #77 ran but **FAILED** ❌
- **No deploy-dev triggered** since build-and-test must pass first

**Next Steps:** The build-and-test failure needs to be investigated and resolved before the code can be deployed to the dev environment.
